data.change_summary: Fifth remediation round addressing 3 QA amendments: (1) Added spawn_missing_binary_returns_binary_not_found test that verifies the critical spawn-failure → BinaryNotFound path by replacing PATH with an empty directory and invoking the adapter, confirming that ErrorKind::NotFound from spawn() produces a non-retryable BinaryNotFound error. (2) Fixed adapter-enforced process timeouts not being recognized by timeout-aware consumers: map_invoke_error in service.rs now promotes InvocationFailed { failure_class: Timeout } to the canonical InvocationTimeout variant, so consumers like worktree rebase (worktree.rs:894) correctly match timeout-specific recovery paths. (3) Made BackendUnavailable failures terminal by mapping them to BinaryNotFound in failure_class(): availability failures (missing binary, missing API key) won't fix themselves between retry attempts, so burning 5 retries plus backoff is wasteful. Updated the agent_execution test to assert BinaryNotFound.
outstanding_risks: Process group kill cannot be implemented due to #![forbid(unsafe_code)] — pre_exec(setsid) requires unsafe, and std::process::Command::process_group is nightly-only. Grandchildren spawned by claude/codex CLI may survive as orphans after the parent is killed on timeout/cancel.

The BinaryNotFound failure class name is slightly misleading when applied to BackendUnavailable errors caused by missing API keys (e.g. OPENROUTER_API_KEY). A more generic name like 'FatalInfrastructure' could be clearer but would require broader renaming across the codebase. The semantic behavior (non-retryable) is correct regardless of naming.

steps.description: Added spawn_missing_binary_returns_binary_not_found test in process_backend_test.rs: uses PathGuard::replace with an empty directory so the binary cannot be found by the OS, calls invoke(), and asserts that the error is InvocationFailed with FailureClass::BinaryNotFound and details containing 'failed to spawn'. This directly tests the spawn ErrorKind::NotFound → BinaryNotFound path at process_backend.rs:986-987.

Fixed adapter-enforced timeout mapping in service.rs map_invoke_error: added a new match arm that intercepts InvocationFailed { failure_class: Timeout } and promotes it to InvocationTimeout { backend, contract_id, timeout_ms } using the request's timeout duration. This ensures consumers like worktree.rs:894 that match on InvocationTimeout correctly identify adapter-enforced process timeouts.

Made BackendUnavailable terminal in error.rs: changed failure_class() mapping from TransportFailure to BinaryNotFound. Availability failures (missing binary via resolve_binary, missing OPENROUTER_API_KEY) are configuration/infrastructure problems that won't resolve between retries. Updated agent_execution_test to service_returns_backend_unavailable_as_binary_not_found asserting BinaryNotFound.

Verified all 678 tests pass (677 base + 1 new spawn_missing_binary test), cargo clippy clean, cargo fmt --check clean. Feature-gated tests: all 72 workflow_engine_test pass, service_returns_backend_unavailable_as_binary_not_found passes, all retry_policy_test pass.

validation_evidence: cargo clippy: no warnings or errors

spawn_missing_binary_returns_binary_not_found: PATH replaced with empty directory, invoke() returns BinaryNotFound with 'failed to spawn' in details — confirms the spawn ErrorKind::NotFound path works end-to-end
service_returns_backend_unavailable_as_binary_not_found: BackendUnavailable now maps to BinaryNotFound (terminal, max_attempts: 1), preventing 5 futile retries for missing binaries and API keys
map_invoke_error now promotes InvocationFailed{Timeout} → InvocationTimeout, ensuring worktree.rs:894 and other timeout-aware consumers correctly handle adapter-enforced process timeouts
All 72 workflow_engine_test tests pass with --features test-stub: retry exhaustion, resume-from-failed, cancellation, backoff, and preflight failure tests all unaffected
Preflight tests (quick_dev_preflight_failure_does_not_start_run, preflight_check_fails_with_unavailable_backend) continue to pass: unavailable backend still fails at preflight before any retry loop
